sourceRepo: bahrain-geojson-main (README: 'Bahrain GeoJSON — Areas/Blocks boundaries, Buildings locations. Export Date: 9 Sep 2021')
coordinateSystem: WGS84 (lng/lat); bounds lng 50.32–50.82, lat 25.57–26.34 — consistent with Bahrain
optimization: Coordinates rounded to 6 decimal places (~0.1m); kept only BLOCK_NO (as string). Reduced 5.76 MB -> 3.23 MB. Boundary shapes unchanged at display scale. SHAPE.AREA, SHAPE.LEN, BLOCK_AR (blank), OBJECTID dropped.
seedCoverage: 450 of 454 seeded delivery_blocks (99.1%) have geometry. Unmatched seeded blocks: 532, 534, 535, 610. 41 geometry blocks are not in the current seed.
usage: Internal-use accepted. External/commercial redistribution license not confirmed.
notes: The Bahrain block map is enabled for internal operational use. The dataset is suitable for internal staging/operations, but its license is not confirmed for external resale, redistribution, or commercial client packaging (source repo has no LICENSE file; 2021 static export). If this product is sold externally, replace the dataset with a licensed/approved source or obtain written permission. Fetched lazily as a static asset only when the manager Block Coverage tab opens; not bundled into the JS.
